vy-√ṛdh Pass. -ṛdhyate, to be unfortunate or unsuccessful, be excluded or deprived of (instr.),  ŚBr.  :
Caus. -ardhayati (Pass. -ardhyate), to exclude from, deprive of (instr.),  AitBr. ;  ŚBr.  Desid. vīrtsati, to wish to nullify or render vain,  AV.  (cf. vīrtsA, ).
